name: blocked_assemble_mvp
prompt: We need the first playable for internal testing. Perform only the nearest correct workflow step. If assemble-mvp does not yet have enough implemented systems, do not assemble a workaround playable, do not implement new systems, and name the next skill explicitly.
forbidden_behaviors: creates reports/mvp-assembly-report.md for a blocked run
implements missing systems under an assemble-mvp request
turns a blocked step-by-step request into a full-run recovery
